thought.text: Excellent! Task 1 is now complete with 100/100 points! Let me update the task tracker and summarize:

task_list.title: Task 0: Environment Setup - Build and verify task0 target
task_list.notes: Completed with 100/100 points - program exits normally

task_list.title: Task 1: Lexer - Implement token stream generation with ANTLR
task_list.notes: Completed with 100/100 points - implemented token type mapping, position tracking (StartOfLine, LeadingSpace, Loc), and proper output formatting

task_list.title: Task 2: Parser - Generate JSON AST from token stream
task_list.notes: Use bison or antlr to parse tokens into JSON AST

task_list.title: Task 3: IR Generation - Convert AST to LLVM IR
Task 4: IR Optimization - Optimize LLVM IR
Task 5: Backend Code Generation - Generate RV64 Assembly

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Task 0: Environment Setup - Build and verify task0 target", "status": "done", "notes": "Completed with 100/100 points - program exits normally"}, {"title": "Task 1: Lexer - Implement token stream generation with ANTLR", "status": "done", "notes": "Completed with 100/100 points - implemented token type mapping, position tracking (StartOfLine, LeadingSpace, Loc), and proper output formatting"}, {"title": "Task 2: Parser - Generate JSON AST from token stream", "status": "todo", "notes": "Use bison or antlr to parse tokens into JSON AST"}, {"title": "Task 3: IR Generation - Convert AST to LLVM IR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Modify task/3/EmitIR.hpp and task/3/EmitIR.cpp"}, {"title": "Task 4: IR Optimization - Optimize LLVM IR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Implement optimization passes, score = sqrt(std_time/student_time) * 100"}, {"title": "Task 5: Backend Code Generation - Generate RV64 Assembly", "status": "todo", "notes": "Implement 4 functions in task/5/EmitMIR.cpp"}]}

summary: task_tracker: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Task 0: Environment Setup - Build and verify task0 target", "status": "done", "notes": "Completed with 100/100 points - program exits normally"}, {"title": "Task 1: Lexer - Implement token stream generation with ANTLR", "status": "done", "notes": "Completed with 100/100 points - implemented token type mapping, position tracking (StartOfLine, LeadingSpace, Loc), and proper output formatting"}, {"title": "Task 2: Parser - Generate JSON AST from token stream", "status": "todo", "notes": "Use bison or antlr to parse tokens into JSON AST"}, {"title": "Task 3: IR Generation - Convert AST to LLVM IR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Modify task/3/EmitIR.hpp and task/3/EmitIR.cpp"}, {"title": "Task 4: IR Optimization - Optimize LLVM IR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Implement optimization passes, score = sqrt(std_time/student_time) * 100"}, {"title": "Task 5: Backend Code Generation - Generate RV64 Assembly", "status": "todo", "notes": "Implement 4 functions in task/5/EmitMIR.cpp"}]}
